chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 529 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.2808/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.2809/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2025 Mr. Mehmood Ahmed Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Prima facie, petitioner seeks relief against respondent No.1 being private respondent, which is not permissible per Article 199 of the Constitution. Perusal of the title demonstrates that remaining respondents are also not legal entity and wrongly impleaded. Even otherwise, the matter pertains, prima facie, to rental dispute for which direct recourse to writ jurisdiction is unwarranted. In view hereof, petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
